scripts.db:up: docker rm -f pg 2>/dev/null || true && docker volume create hospitality_pgdata >/dev/null && docker run --name pg -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=hospitality -p 5432:5432 -v hospitality_pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data -d postgres:16 && bash -lc 'for i in {1..60}; do docker exec pg pg_isready -U postgres -d hospitality >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "pg ready" && exit 0; sleep 1; done; echo "pg not ready"; docker logs --tail 200 pg; exit 1'
scripts.dev:local: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && next dev
